expectations.text: Report contains a Summary section with a brief overview of the codebase and key findings
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-5: Summary section describes the project as 'graph deep learning project for financial transaction analysis' and identifies the most critical finding (cluster of bugs in main.py).

expectations.text: Report contains a structured Findings section with individual issues
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-389: 19 individual findings each as a separate subsection under '## Findings'.

expectations.text: Each finding has a severity level (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: Every finding title is prefixed with [CRITICAL], [HIGH], [MEDIUM], or [LOW]. 3 Critical, 8 High, 7 Medium, 4 Low.

expectations.text: Each finding has a category (Correctness/Security/Error Handling/Performance/Maintainability)
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes a '**Category**:' line with one of the defined categories. Most are Correctness, with Security and Maintainability also used.

expectations.text: Each finding cites specific file paths with line numbers
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes a '**Location**:' line with file path(s) and line numbers, e.g., 'project_constellation/main.py line 10'.

expectations.text: Each finding includes evidence such as code snippets or specific patterns
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes an '**Evidence**:' section with code snippets in fenced code blocks showing the actual problematic code.

expectations.text: Each finding includes a suggested fix
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes a '**Suggested fix**:' line with a specific remediation approach.

expectations.text: Each finding includes an effort estimate (Small/Medium/Large/Architectural)
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes an '**Effort**:' line. Most are 'Small (< 1 hour)', two are 'Medium (hours)'. Uses the exact scale from the skill template.

expectations.text: Findings are ordered from highest to lowest severity
expectations.evidence: Findings appear in order: 3 Critical → 8 High → 7 Medium → 4 Low.

expectations.text: Report includes an Issues Not Found section noting categories with no significant findings
expectations.evidence: Lines 391-398: 'Issues Not Found' section covers SQL Injection, Race Conditions, Dependency Vulnerabilities, Circular Dependencies, N+1 Queries, and CORS.

expectations.text: No findings are speculative -- every issue is backed by specific code evidence
expectations.evidence: Finding about AssertionError (lines 269-281) is confused and self-contradictory -- the agent goes back and forth about whether it's a typo, then retracts the finding but it still appears in the report. This suggests the finding was not properly verified.
